title: Bonus Calculator
notes: basic_salary is a number in rupees. years_employed is a number and can be a decimal like 1.5.

meeting_script.name: Priya Sharma
meeting_script.message: Morning everyone. HR needs a bonus calculator built into the payroll system. Rahul, Sneha — can you walk us through what you need?

meeting_script.name: Rahul Mehta
meeting_script.message: Sure. Employees who have completed more than one year with us get a performance bonus. The bonus is 10 percent of their basic salary.

meeting_script.name: Sneha Kapoor
meeting_script.message: One thing from my side — the bonus cannot exceed Rs 50,000. We have a strict budget cap per employee.

meeting_script.name: Rahul Mehta
meeting_script.message: And just to clarify — the 10 percent is calculated on basic salary only. Not the total CTC package.

meeting_script.name: Priya Sharma
meeting_script.message: Okay I think that covers it. Head to your desk when you are ready.
